backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages per-user favorite radio stations using a Principal-keyed map, exposing addFavorite, removeFavorite, and getFavorites endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based monochrome CSS custom properties for light and dark themes across background, foreground, card, border, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Antenna app, including PWA manifest link, Apple meta tags, Space Grotesk/Space Mono Google Fonts, and the React root mount point.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for the Antenna app defining name, dark theme colors, standalone display mode, and two icon assets (256px and 512px).
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view routing (stations/favorites/globe), search state, audio amplitude tracking via Web Audio API, and wiring together player, theme, favorites mutations, and station queries.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: App header component rendering the Antenna title, a search toggle button, and three view-switching tabs (Stations, Saved, Globe) with active state styling.
Canvas-based audio frequency bar visualizer using monochrome greyscale colors, with a ResizeObserver for responsive sizing and an idle flat-line state when not playing.
frontend/src/components/BottomToolbar.ts: Renders the bottom playback toolbar with volume slider, play/pause/stop controls, theme toggle, fullscreen toggle, and a meatball menu with share/info options.
Renders an animated 3D Earth globe using Three.js/React Three Fiber with a pulsing marker at the station's geographic coordinates, supporting light/dark theme adjustments.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenOverla: Full-screen overlay component that displays the 3D globe background, audio visualizer, station info, playback status, and rotating anti-subscription slogans with fade transitions.
frontend/src/components/GlobeView.tsx: Interactive 3D globe view using Three.js/React Three Fiber that plots radio station locations as clickable points, supports hover tooltips, orbit controls, and light/dark theming.
frontend/src/components/HUDLayout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper component that provides a full-height background container for the HUD interface.
Displays the currently playing station's name, playback/stream health status, audio visualizer, and a rotating set of anti-subscription slogans with fade transitions.
frontend/src/components/RadarWidget.tsx: A canvas-based animated radar widget that visually reflects radio playback state (playing, loading, paused, error) by modulating sweep speed, trail brightness, and blip rendering based on audio amplitude.
frontend/src/components/SearchPanel.tsx: A search form component for filtering radio stations by name, genre tag (with quick-select buttons), and country (with a filterable dropdown), triggering search callbacks on input or Enter key.
frontend/src/components/StationList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of radio stations with play/loading indicators, favicons, and favorite toggle buttons, supporting both API RadioStation and backend Station types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and removing favorite stations from the ICP backend actor, plus a utility to convert API RadioStation objects to the backend Station type.
frontend/src/hooks/useRadioPlayer.ts: A React hook managing HTML audio playback for radio streams, including play/pause/stop/volume control, Web Audio API analyser node setup, stall detection, and automatic retry logic with exponential backoff.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom React hook that manages dark/light theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and toggles a 'light' class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: Custom React hook that requests a Screen Wake Lock API lock when enabled, releases it when disabled, and re-requests it on tab visibility change.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH CSS custom property color tokens for dark and light themes, typography, scrollbar styles, and a fade-in keyframe animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/services/radioBrowserApi.ts: Service module wrapping the Radio Browser API with functions to fetch top stations, globe stations (deduplicated from votes+clicks), search stations, fetch countries/tags, and register station clicks.
frontend/src/utils/geoMapping.ts: Utility file providing a lookup table mapping country names to their approximate latitude/longitude coordinates for use in globe/map visualizations.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Space Grotesk/Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom border radii, accordion/fade-in animations, and the animate/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording two pending feature requests: adding cycling slogans to the GlobeView tab (AR-1/AR-2) and fixing the perpetual loading bug in the Stations tab (AR-3).
